# Publication Audit Divergence Report

**Auto-generated.** Every distinct cited note in any tracked
publication table whose audit-derived `effective_status` is NOT
retained-grade. This is the work queue for closing the gap between
author-side claim language and audit-lane verdicts.

**Retained-grade values:** `retained`, `retained_bounded`, `retained_no_go`,
plus `decoration_under_*` (boxed under retained parent). Anything else
means the audit has not confirmed the claim, regardless of how the
publication tables phrase it.
